Our Solutions

With a powerful suite of zk solutions, Zypher is redefining how Autonomous Worlds are architected,

catering to a global audience of 3 billion players.

Secret Engine

A suite of zk-as-a-service SDKs to provide information asymmetry for games requiring strategy mechanism. ZKP enables fully on-chain secrets and randomness with provable fairness.

Learn More

AW Engine

A modular framework that enables games to hyper-scale vertically. Programmable through circuits or zkVM. Its z4 SDK can support real-time in-game Multiplayer events (PvP).

Learn More

Zytron Kit

A Sovereign Rollup L3 Chain Stack to offer easy deployment of game infra with p2p layer optimizations, server sharding, and more. Designed for large scale multi-player games and AW building.

Learn More

Redacted

Deploy multiplayer, massive games on [redacted] with your preferred programming language (RUST/Solidity/WASM) and game engine (Bevy/Unity/Unreal). Pre-registration is coming soon.

Learn More

All-in-One Sovereign Rollup

Zytron Kit provides a highly customizable Layer 3 sovereign roll up stack.

The most viable infrastructure for production-level massive multiplayer games.

3,000X

Better UE for Gamers

  • 30X

    Cheaper

  • 30X

    Faster

  • 10X

    Game Genres

  • Data Compatability

    Abstracted, dev-friendly relational databases to expedite game data-processing.

  • Instant Finality

    P2P layer optimization (e.g. special UDP protocol) & message transmission within small groups for 100 ms-level tick time.

  • Server Sharding

    Clustered nodes for world map / service distribution and retrieval algorithms (e.g. information synchronization).

Developer Resources

Our zk Game Engines provide crypto-native

games with required composability, programmability, scalability and secret primitives.

Search your zk solutions

Modules

  • Celestia

    Celestia is a modular data availability network that securely scales with the...

  • opBNB

    An Optimized Layer-2 Solution That Delivers Lower Fees And Higher Throughput To...

  • Linea

    A developer-ready zkEVM rollup for scaling Ethereum dapps

4 modules installed

Sovereign Rollup

Provides the highest availability in the distributed system, and the entire system can be quickly upgraded and automatically deployed.

  • On-chain Contracts

    Provides rich precompiled contracts interfaces and Solidity/WASM/Move contracts for zk verifiers and other tools.

  • zk Toolchain

    A ZK engine library that developers can use to write zk circuits and plug-n-play zk functions, also support zk DSL / zk VM.

  • Server Sharding

    Distribute the game's world map into different nodes to improve carrying capacity of a single node.

  • Customized Network

    Games have high demands on the network. We have optimized the underlying p2p network layer so that it can support game scenarios.

  • Data Compatibility

    Built-in relational database and cache database to speed up the processing of game data.

  • Developer Hub

    Build the next-gen decentralized game now.

    Docs

Evolve, Autonomously

In AW (Autonomous Worlds) games, the blockchain is used as an alternative to centralized game servers, with all players indexing from and writing to a shared state on-chain.

Redefined Digital Ownership

Verifiable attestations and asset programmability grant gamers true, composable digital ownership of achievements & assets & the game itself, leveraging blockchain's inherent transparency and interoperability.

Owner: Alice

  • Smart-contract Encoded

    Game logic is entirely encoded in smart contracts for on-chain execution, ensuring tamper-proof, truestless game loops.

  • Endure & Evolve Infinitely

    Allows the community to create content beyond predefined rules, independent of developer-provided clients.

  • Economic HyperStructure

    Tokenization and governance primitives are integral, aligning monetization flow for developers and players.

Zypher DAO

One or more people create a set of rules in the form of decentralized codes

based upon which collective efforts are made to build a community of things.

  • IGO Launchpad

    Multichain Initial Game Offerings (IGO) and other go-to-market & advisory support to help your games launched.

  • zk-Service Subscription

    Subscribe to our zk-as-a-service solutions to reduce research-production cycle. Contribute to our open-source codebase.

  • Layer3 Governance

    L3 Protocol powered by the Zytron Kit and governed by Zypher DAO. Play, create, vote alongside leading innovators and thinkers

The Manifesto

Smart contracts are social contracts.

We recognize the gaming realm as a fertile microcosm, a testing ground for technologies and systems with the potential to redefine society.

More Insights

Featured Games

Crypto Rumble

BNB Chain Hackathon Istanbul 1st place winner. The first zkp-powered, fully on-chain tile-matching game.

Play Now

Divine Cataclysm : Oblivion

In the world of cards, heroes and deities weave their destinies, and wisdom and decisions forge legends...

Play Now

zAce Poker

Discover zACE, the fairest and most exciting Texas Hold'em with radical transparency.

Play Now

zBingo

zBingo employs advanced Zero-Knowledge Proofs (ZKPs) to ensure provably fair gameplay and leverages artificial intelligence for quick and efficient matchmaking.

Play Now

z2048

Immerse yourself in an evolutionary gaming journey with z2048, seamlessly integrating the quintessential mechanics of the classic 2048 puzzle with an autonomous fully on-chain methodology.

Play Now

Lead the AW Revolution Together.
